creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Aug  5 08:36:13 2012
New Revision: 302099
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302099

Log:
  Pentadactyl is a free browser add-on for Firefox, designed to make browsing
  more efficient and especially more keyboard accessible. Largely inspired by
  the Vim text editor, the appearance and finger feel of Pentadactyl should be
  familiar to Vim users.
  
  WWW:	http://5digits.org/pentadactyl
  
  PR:		ports/170047
  Submitted by:	clutton mbsd@isgroup.com.ua

Added:
  head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/
  head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 08:29:26 2012	(r302098)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 08:36:13 2012	(r302099)
@@ -2083,6 +2083,7 @@
     SUBDIR += xpi-passwordmaker
     SUBDIR += xpi-pdf_download
     SUBDIR += xpi-pencil
+    SUBDIR += xpi-pentadactyl
     SUBDIR += xpi-permatabs
     SUBDIR += xpi-prism
     SUBDIR += xpi-quick-locale-switcher

Added: head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 08:36:13 2012	(r302099)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	xpi-pentadactyl
+# Date created:							20	Jul	2012
+# Whom:									clutton mbsd@isgroup.com.ua
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	pentadactyl
+PORTVERSION=	1.0r1
+DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-fx
+CATEGORIES=	www
+DISTNAME=	pentadactyl-${PORTVERSION:S/r/rc/}${DISTVERSIONSUFFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	mbsd@isgroup.com.ua
+COMMENT=	Firefox for Vim and Links addicts.
+
+XPI_NUM=	235854
+XPI_ID=		pentadactyl@dactyl.googlecode.com
+
+.include "${.CURDIR}/../xpi-adblock/Makefile.xpi"
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 08:36:13 2012	(r302099)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (xpi/pentadactyl-1.0rc1-fx.xpi) = 334a4fcd160c52b04c4031cfbb54145b893271d8c9e2b44b134483dda1099f70
+SIZE (xpi/pentadactyl-1.0rc1-fx.xpi) = 518452

Added: head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/pkg-descr	Sun Aug  5 08:36:13 2012	(r302099)
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+Pentadactyl is a free browser add-on for Firefox, designed to make browsing
+more efficient and especially more keyboard accessible. Largely inspired by
+the Vim text editor, the appearance and finger feel of Pentadactyl should be
+familiar to Vim users. 
+
+WWW:	http://5digits.org/pentadactyl
